subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Covenant, learned one of the school of divine knowledge, thy letter, which was enclosed with that of Jenáb-i-Bábá'í-i-Kalímí [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خادم میثاق ادیب دبستان عرفان مکتوبی که در طیش مکتوب جناب باباای کلیمی بود
subcodes.subjects: @confirmations and rewards in teaching the Cause, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
